title: coelachyrum brevifolium
intro: Coelachyrum brevifolium is a flowering plant species, commonly known as the Short-leaved Coelachyrum, which belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Coelachyrum brevifolium is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing protection against infections. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are consumed for its medicinal properties.
